name: Double Banana Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package (18.1/2 oz) banana flavored cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and bake the cake following package directions for 9-inch round layers; cool.
2. To serve, place one layer, topside down, on a serving plate. Spread with vanilla pudding. Cover with banana slices, then top with second layer.
3. Make frosting, reserving 2 to 3 tablespoons. Color green and set aside.
4. Spread remaining frosting on the top and sides of the cake.
5. Using green frosting, pipe "Happy Birthday" on top of the cake.
6. Decorate with as many butterflies as desired.
7. Creamy Orange Butter Frosting:
- Blend 5 tablespoons softened butter or margarine, finely grated orange peel, sifted confectioners' sugar (3 cups), and 2 to 3 tablespoons Florida orange juice until smooth and spreadable. If the frosting is too thick, gradually add more orange juice.
8. Makes enough frosting for one 9-inch round cake with two layers.
